_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: MySQL
author: aetherix@lunexia.com
description:
MySQL database server egg.

MySQL 8.4 LTS is the recommended version. MySQL 8.0 reached end-of-life in April 2026.

Default port: 3306.
Data is stored in /home/container/data.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# MySQL Installation Script
# by Aetherix-ops
#
apt update && apt install -y mysql-server

mkdir -p /mnt/server/data

mysqld --initialize-insecure --user=root --datadir=/mnt/server/data

echo "[mysqld]" > /mnt/server/my.cnf
echo "datadir=/home/container/data" >> /mnt/server/my.cnf
echo "port=3306" >> /mnt/server/my.cnf
echo "bind-address=0.0.0.0" >> /mnt/server/my.cnf
echo "innodb_buffer_pool_size=128M" >> /mnt/server/my.cnf

echo "install complete"

variables.name: MySQL Root Password
variables.description: Root password for MySQL. Set this on first install.

variables.name: InnoDB Buffer Pool (MB)
variables.description: Buffer pool size in MB. Recommended: 50-75% of available RAM.
